$schema-note: HIMMEL-689 — delegation-lane registry. Consumed by scripts/lanes/resolve.mjs. Inventory here; invariant policy stays in CLAUDE.md.
$quota-note: quota.bank declares the machine-readable bank governing the lane (HIMMEL-1000 exporter fanout); lanes without it are dashboard-omitted.

lanes.label: Fable 5
lanes.bestFor: judgment, taste — the ~10% hardest calls; escalation target

lanes.label: GLM inline subagent (Agent tool -> spawn-glm)
lanes.bestFor: in-session GLM dispatch with inline result (parent stays live)

lanes.label: claudex lane (scripts/claude-codex — Claude Code harness over the codex sub via local CLIProxyAPI)
lanes.bestFor: implementation chunks on the codex weekly bank with the FULL himmel harness (skills/hooks/guardrails/worktrees); per-dispatch subagent model+effort control the codex CLI harness lacks
lanes.effort: codex weekly bank (treat as generous); launcher DEFAULTS effort to HIGH (HIMMEL-1001), overridable per-dispatch via CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL — forwarded VERBATIM to gpt-5.6-sol ('ultra' unreachable, falls back to xhigh; never max, undocumented juice). Ladder: medium/high default, xhigh rare. Watch the 272k context ceiling (2x bill past it) + don't fan out subagents from a high/xhigh parent. Rules+mapping: docs/tooling-catalog.md#claude-codex (HIMMEL-1001/1002)

lanes.label: GitHub Copilot CLI (free tier)
lanes.bestFor: free chores / second opinions — 2,000 completions/mo bank; dispatch ONLY via bash scripts/copilot/dispatch-copilot.sh --worktree <wt> <args> (the chokepoint ENFORCES HIMMEL-772: allow-list passthrough - never a deny-list, worktree containment via pwd -P, wrapper-composed granular grants - --allow-tool 'shell(git:*)'/'write' + --deny-url '*' + --add-dir <worktree> - with a guarded COPILOT_ALLOW_ALL_FALLBACK=1 opt-in, --model auto pin unless the caller names one, per-dispatch ledger); worker-spawn-matrix row UNVERIFIED (live smoke pending eval)
lanes.effort: small tasks only — model tier is mini-class unless the caller overrides the auto pin

lanes.label: hermes one-shot (scripts/hermes/dispatch-trusted.sh)
lanes.bestFor: trusted-engine impl/build dispatch — multi-provider chokepoint (default gpt-5.5 codex; --model selects e.g. qwen3-coder-plus); parity_guard fences writes; LIVE-PROVEN spawn path (worker-spawn matrix)
lanes.effort: no internal timeout — caller wraps; toolsets opt-in via --toolsets

lanes.label: DeepSeek via hermes (deepseek-v4-flash / deepseek-v4-pro)
lanes.bestFor: cheap one-shot classification/triage/extraction and mechanical text work; CN egress — vault corpora only per egress-matrix cells
lanes.effort: one-shots; no worker sessions on this reach path

lanes.label: codex CLI sandbox (scripts/codex/dispatch-codex-exec.sh)
lanes.bestFor: offloaded impl in a git worktree via the codex CLI sandbox - dispatch ONLY via bash scripts/codex/dispatch-codex-exec.sh --worktree <wt> <args> (the chokepoint ENFORCES the HIMMEL-741 invariants: ACL preflight fail-closed, gpt-5.5 pin - codex-variant names 400 on ChatGPT auth, --background refused - upstream silent death; pair long runs with scripts/codex/companion-liveness.sh)
lanes.effort: well-scoped chunks; job registry is per-workspace

lanes.label: codex WSL lane (scripts/codex/dispatch-codex-wsl.sh)
lanes.bestFor: offloaded impl in an in-distro ext4 clone via the codex CLI - dispatch ONLY via bash scripts/codex/dispatch-codex-wsl.sh --distro <name> --clone <in-distro-abs-path> [--brief-file <path>] [args...] (the chokepoint ENFORCES the HIMMEL-999 invariants: in-distro physical-path containment - /mnt refused, per-clone mutex, quota preflight fail-open, gpt-5.5 + workspace-write pins, flow-runs.jsonl ledger rows; raw 'wsl ... codex exec' is hook-blocked)

lanes.label: Antigravity CLI (Google AI Plus)
lanes.bestFor: free-bank chores/second opinions — roster per 2026-07-08 research: Gemini 3.5 Flash / 3.1 Pro + Claude Sonnet/Opus 4.6 + GPT-OSS 120B (AI-Plus subset + quota shape TO VERIFY at eval, HIMMEL-772); headless agy -p; EGRESS: gemini-family cells are matrix-DENIED for vault corpora (himmel-code only); parity/guards UNVERIFIED — permission flags only, NO hook surface (wrapper-level guards required)
lanes.effort: simple tasks; --output-format drift seen on Windows builds

lanes.label: ollama (local models)
lanes.bestFor: zero-egress local inference (qwen2.5-coder:7b pulled) — the ONLY salus-eligible backend (per-run opt-in) and the graphify zero-egress fallback; zero-egress guarantee: bare model names never reach cloud, cloud is opt-in only via the -cloud suffix (structural, always holds); OLLAMA_NO_CLOUD=1 is a defense-in-depth pin, set per-machine (docs/setup/new-machine.md) and checked ADVISORY by /himmel-doctor — not itself the guarantee; slow, small tasks

lanes.label: OpenRouter free models
lanes.bestFor: free-tier model pool — probe web for current uptime/availability before routing; simple tasks only; rate-limited; parity/guards UNVERIFIED pending eval

lanes.label: Ollama Cloud (free tier, ollama.com)
lanes.bestFor: hosted open models on the free bank (verified 2026-07-08: 5h session limits + weekly limits, 1 concurrent cloud model, larger models Pro-only) — NOT the local lane: content EGRESSES to ollama.com, an UNDECLARED provider in the egress matrix -> vault corpora default-DENY (himmel-code only) until the operator declares a cell; parity/guards UNVERIFIED pending eval
